title: The Capital Falls Into Chaos
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on the capital falls into chaos, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Capital Falls Into Chaos. Vivi’s desperate attempts to stop the fighting are drowned out by the chaos Crocodile engineered. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: As sand, I sucked up all the moisture in your arm.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Perhaps I'll have you die by sucking all the moisture out from your entire body.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That'll give you a true taste of the desert...

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: This is the water that the dried-up gramps in Yuba spent all night digging up!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: that Yuba would never be defeated by mere sand!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: I finish you off for good.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Die...I along with that stubborn land of Yuba!

summary: This part develops the capital falls into chaos and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
